From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1942 film

For other films, see [La maestrina (disambiguation)](/wiki/La_maestrina_(disambiguation) "La maestrina (disambiguation)").

| The Little Teacher | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Giorgio Bianchi](/wiki/Giorgio_Bianchi_(director) "Giorgio Bianchi (director)") |
| Written by | Giorgio Bianchi   [Augusto Mazzetti](/w/index.php?title=Augusto_Mazzetti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Augusto Mazzetti (page does not exist)") |
| Based on | *The Little Teacher* by [Dario Niccodemi](/wiki/Dario_Niccodemi "Dario Niccodemi") |
| Produced by | [Attilio Fattori](/w/index.php?title=Attilio_Fattori&action=edit&redlink=1 "Attilio Fattori (page does not exist)")   [Vincenzo Genesi](/w/index.php?title=Vincenzo_Genesi&action=edit&redlink=1 "Vincenzo Genesi (page does not exist)") |
| Starring | [Maria Denis](/wiki/Maria_Denis "Maria Denis")   [Nino Besozzi](/wiki/Nino_Besozzi "Nino Besozzi")   [Elvira Betrone](/wiki/Elvira_Betrone "Elvira Betrone") |
| Cinematography | [Mario Craveri](/wiki/Mario_Craveri "Mario Craveri") |
| Edited by | [Mario Bonotti](/wiki/Mario_Bonotti "Mario Bonotti") |
| Music by | [Alessandro Cicognini](/wiki/Alessandro_Cicognini "Alessandro Cicognini") |
| Production company | Nembo Film |
| Distributed by | Artisti Associati |
| Release date | * 8 October 1942 (1942-10-08) |
| Running time | 83 minutes |
| Country | Italy |
| Language | [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language") |

***The Little Teacher*** (Italian: ***La maestrina***) is a 1942 Italian [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [Giorgio Bianchi](/wiki/Giorgio_Bianchi_(director) "Giorgio Bianchi (director)") and starring [Maria Denis](/wiki/Maria_Denis "Maria Denis"), [Nino Besozzi](/wiki/Nino_Besozzi "Nino Besozzi") and [Elvira Betrone](/wiki/Elvira_Betrone "Elvira Betrone").[[1]](#cite_note-1) It was based on a play of the same title by [Dario Niccodemi](/wiki/Dario_Niccodemi "Dario Niccodemi").[[2]](#cite_note-2) It was shot at the [Cinecittà Studios](/wiki/Cinecitt%C3%A0_Studios "Cinecittà Studios") in [Rome](/wiki/Rome "Rome") and [on location](/wiki/Location_shooting "Location shooting") around [Lake Orta](/wiki/Lake_Orta "Lake Orta") in [Piedmont](/wiki/Piedmont "Piedmont"). The film's sets were designed by the [art directors](/wiki/Art_director "Art director") [Gino Brosio](/w/index.php?title=Gino_Brosio&action=edit&redlink=1 "Gino Brosio (page does not exist)") and [Ottavio Scotti](/wiki/Ottavio_Scotti "Ottavio Scotti").

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Little_Teacher_(1942_film)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Maria Denis](/wiki/Maria_Denis "Maria Denis") as Maria Bini, la maestrina
* [Nino Besozzi](/wiki/Nino_Besozzi "Nino Besozzi") as Il sindaco
* [Elvira Betrone](/wiki/Elvira_Betrone "Elvira Betrone") as La direttrice
* [Virgilio Riento](/wiki/Virgilio_Riento "Virgilio Riento") as Pallone, il bidello
* [Enrico Glori](/wiki/Enrico_Glori "Enrico Glori") as Giacomo Macchia
* [Annibale Betrone](/wiki/Annibale_Betrone "Annibale Betrone") as Il medico
* [Clara Auteri Pepe](/w/index.php?title=Clara_Auteri_Pepe&action=edit&redlink=1 "Clara Auteri Pepe (page does not exist)") as La prima maestra
* [Amalia Beretta](/w/index.php?title=Amalia_Beretta&action=edit&redlink=1 "Amalia Beretta (page does not exist)") as La seconda maestra
* [Angela Lavagna](/w/index.php?title=Angela_Lavagna&action=edit&redlink=1 "Angela Lavagna (page does not exist)") as La terza maestra
* [Luciana Lucarelli](/w/index.php?title=Luciana_Lucarelli&action=edit&redlink=1 "Luciana Lucarelli (page does not exist)") as La piccola Annina
* [Umberto Sacripante](/wiki/Umberto_Sacripante "Umberto Sacripante") as Il vetturino
* [Claudio Ermelli](/wiki/Claudio_Ermelli "Claudio Ermelli") as L'usciere
* [Giovanna Ralli](/wiki/Giovanna_Ralli "Giovanna Ralli") as Una bambina
